name: Camogli
character: pebble and black-sand, ferry departure point
imageCredit: Hayden Soloviev, CC BY 4.0, Wikimedia Commons
blurb: Free pebble and black-sand mix with public area alongside paid deck chairs, and the San Fruttuoso ferry departing from the pier. Focacceria Revello on Via Garibaldi 183 has been making Recco-style focaccia for over 60 years and is worth the stop. Train from Sestri in 20 minutes is the recommended approach rather than driving.
